expectations.evidence: Old skill uses verification-protocol.md in Phase 1 (combined finding+verification in one session)
Old skill uses {perspective-id}-analyst naming for Phase 1 analysts

expectations.text: Phase 2 Stage A에서 finding 분석가를 shutdown해야 함
expectations.evidence: Old skill has no Stage A/B separation. Analysts self-verify within their own session.

expectations.text: Phase 2 Stage B에서 새로운 verification 세션을 spawn해야 함
expectations.evidence: Old skill does not spawn separate verification sessions. Verification is embedded in analyst prompt.
Old skill has no verifier sessions. Only {perspective-id}-analyst exists.

expectations.text: Verification 세션이 findings.json을 읽고 prism_interview를 실행해야 함
expectations.evidence: Old skill runs prism_interview in the same session that wrote findings.json, not a separate read-then-verify session.
